'''Bone daggers''' can be bought from [[Nardok's Bone Weapons]] in the [[Dorgeshuun Mines]] outside [[Dorgesh-Kaan]] for 2,000 [[coins]]. They can also be [[poison]]ed.

Its stats are the same as those of the [[iron dagger]].

==Special attack==
[[File:Backstab.gif|250px|thumb|A player performing the bone dagger's special attack, ''Backstab''.]]
The bone dagger has a [[special attack]], ''Backstab'', (75%) which will never miss as long as the target has not been damaged previously or you weren't the last one to damage the target. It lowers the target's [[Defence]] by the amount of damage dealt, similar to the [[Bandos godsword]]'s and [[Dorgeshuun crossbow]]'s special attacks. The defence lowering is only applied when the target doesn't currently have their defence levels lowered.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://x.com/JagexAsh/status/1798626951885889739|date=6 June 2024|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/tsLWH|archivedate=6 June 2024|quote=Correct - they'll only try to reduce it if it's on (or above) its base level at the time. If it had been reduced previously, then restored to the base level, they could try to reduce it again.}}

While the weapon can be used prior to the [[Death to the Dorgeshuun]] [[quest]], the special attack can only be used after completion.

Bone dagger's special attack is commonly used within the [[Tombs of Amascut]], where the guaranteed hit is particularly effective against high defence enemies in higher invocation raids. It can be used effectively in both solo and team raids, where the player should ensure that they were not the last one to damage the target and it is used before any other forms of defence reduction.

{{bug|When the special attack is used against [[Kephri]] in teams, the bone dagger must be the first attack before anyone else hits the boss to hit her for a guaranteed hit.}}

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|update = Varlamore & Summer Sweep-Up Combat Tweaks
|date = 6 August 2025
|change = 
 The bone dagger's [[special attack]] now correctly guarantees a hit against the following bosses when used on the first hit:
* [[Kephri]]
* [[Duke Sucellus]]
* [[Phantom Muspah]]
* [[Doom of Mokhaiotl]]
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 7 July 2021
|update = Small Changes & Tweaks
|poll =
|change = The position of the weapon and its variants on female players has been adjusted so that they appear to be equipped properly.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 22 August 2006
|update = Naming conventions
|change =
*The extra strong poisoned variant was renamed from "Bone dagger (+)" to "Bone dagger (p+)".
*The super strong poisoned variant was renamed from "Bone dagger (s)" to "Bone dagger (p++)".
}}
